reviews.comment:
Siempre las mejores estaciones son las ypf, atención, precio y calidad asegurado.
El agua para el mate es la máquina de taragui y es gratis, un 10.
El autoservicio ypf full súper limpio, ordenado, buena atención y gran variedad de productos.

(Translated by Google)
YPF stations are always the best; service, price, and quality are guaranteed.
The hot water for mate is from the Taragui machine and it's free—a 10 out of 10! The YPF self-service station is super clean, organized, has great service, and a wide variety of products.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsa2ZiZ0l3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente punto para que conductires y acompañantes descansen, tomen un buen café, degustan muy buenos sándwiches de jamón y queso en pan francés. También se puede almorzar y/o cenar con platos sencillos y buenos precios. Muy recomendable en la Autovía 2.

(Translated by Google)
An excellent spot for drivers and passengers to rest, enjoy a good coffee, and savor delicious ham and cheese sandwiches on French bread. Lunch and/or dinner are also available, with simple dishes at reasonable prices. Highly recommended on Highway 2.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsM3F2eDZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Estoy muy conforme con el servicio ya estuve  otra ves y los que atienden son personas cordiales y lo que es cafeteria  tambien y se nota  quetodo es fresco verdad un gusto  para a tomar un cafe y comer algo  solo un detalle en verano..arian falta mas surtidores  para el verano lasmedia lunas so ricas pero pebetes jamon y queso son espetaculares

(Translated by Google)
I am very satisfied with the service. I have been there before and the people who serve are cordial and the cafeteria is also friendly and you can tell that everything is fresh, really a pleasure to have a coffee and eat something, just a nice touch in the summer... they need more pumps for the summer. The croissants are delicious but the ham and cheese sandwiches are spectacular.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsbXZuZENnEAE
